title: pedilonum gnomus
intro: Pedilonum gnomus, also known as Pedicularis gnomus, is a plant species within the Pedicularis genus, commonly found in alpine and subalpine regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Pedilonum gnomus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Pedilonum gnomus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
